items.title: 🔥 Trending: AI/research-assistant
items.description: Open-source research assistant powered by LLMs for academic inquiry and critical analysis

items.title: 🤖 New Model:EducationGPT-7B
items.description: Language model fine-tuned for educational contexts and pedagogical applications

items.title: Teaching Critical Thinking in the Age of AI
items.description: New research explores how educators can foster critical thinking skills while students increasingly interact with AI systems. The study examines pedagogical approaches that encourage students to question, analyze, and evaluate AI-generated content.

items.title: Inquiry-Based Learning Improves Student Outcomes
items.description: A comprehensive meta-analysis of 150 studies shows that inquiry-based learning significantly improves student engagement, retention, and critical thinking abilities across all educational levels.

items.title: Media Literacy in Digital Education
items.description: Researchers identify key components of media literacy curricula that help students evaluate sources, identify misinformation, and develop stronger reasoning skills in digital environments.

items.title: Cognitive Science Insights for Teaching Reasoning
items.description: New findings in cognitive science reveal how students develop reasoning abilities and what instructional strategies best support the development of analytical thinking skills.
